# Vision Angles Security

> Vision Angles Security Est. is a trusted supplier and integrator of CCTV, access control, video intercom, burglar alarm, network and ELV (Extra-Low Voltage) solutions across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Headquartered in Al Khobar with showrooms in Al Khobar and Al Jubail, and regional representation in Riyadh and Jeddah.

## About

- Company: Vision Angles Security Est.
- Industry: Security systems, surveillance, access control, ELV solutions, IT networking
- Headquarters: Al Khobar 34714, Eastern Province, Saudi Arabia
- Phone: +966 13 822 6660
- Email: info@visionangles.com
- Working Hours: Sat–Thu, 8 AM – 6 PM (AST)
- Service Area: Al Khobar, Dammam, Al Jubail, Riyadh, Jeddah and across Saudi Arabia

## Core Products

- [Surveillance Solutions](https://www.visionangles.com/surveillance-solutions.html): IP cameras, NVR/DVR systems, video analytics
- [Access Control](https://www.visionangles.com/access-control.html): Biometric readers, card readers, turnstile integration
- [Video Intercom](https://www.visionangles.com/video-intercom.html): IP video door phones and apartment intercom systems
- [Burglar Alarm Systems](https://www.visionangles.com/buglar-alarm.html): Wireless intrusion detection and monitoring
- [Network Solutions](https://www.visionangles.com/network-solutions.html): Switches, routers, firewalls, structured cabling
- [Speed Gates & Turnstiles](https://www.visionangles.com/speed-gates.html): Pedestrian access control hardware
- [LED Displays](https://www.visionangles.com/led-displays.html): Indoor/outdoor LED video walls and signage
- [Interactive Flat Panels](https://www.visionangles.com/interactive-flat-panels.html): Smart boards for education and corporate
- [Thermal Cameras](https://www.visionangles.com/thermal.html): Heat detection and perimeter security
- [Audio Products](https://www.visionangles.com/audio-products.html): Public address, conference and commercial audio
- [IP Phones](https://www.visionangles.com/ip_phones.html): VoIP business communication systems
- [Parking Management](https://www.visionangles.com/parking_management.html): ANPR, barriers and parking guidance
- [Accessories](https://www.visionangles.com/accessories.html): Cables, mounts, power supplies and integration accessories

## Brand Partners

Hikvision, Dahua, ZKTeco, EZVIZ, Sophos, Fortinet, WatchGuard, Cisco, Grandstream, Bosch, Hanwha, Ahuja, Bose, Shure, D-Link, TP-Link, Ruijie, Samsung, Paradox, Ajax.

## Web Development

Vision Angles also delivers custom software and SaaS: attendance systems, expense trackers, stock management and bespoke web/mobile applications. See [Web Development](https://www.visionangles.com/web.html).

## Contact

For quotations, project consultations or partnership enquiries, contact info@visionangles.com or call +966 13 822 6660. Visit our showrooms in Al Khobar and Al Jubail.
